channel.title: Comments on: Sam Calagione Cooks With Beer
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: andrewt248
item.dc:creator: andrewt248
item.description: Cheers to Sam Calagione and the Dogfish crew for bringing us an ever evolving range of new beer flavors!
item.content:encoded: Cheers to Sam Calagione and the Dogfish crew for bringing us an ever evolving range of new beer flavors!

item.title: By: Keith in Sequim
item.dc:creator: Keith in Sequim
item.description:
Thanks Sam and Brian,
I cant wait until it's BBQ season here in the Northwest so I can try those recipes out. We have lots of fresh seafood up in our area and I am wondering if you could use the musel recipe in a steamer with oyster or clams too? Thanks to Sam, Brian and of course Paul for brining these great videos to us. p.s. Sam are you always so high strung? :)
item.content:encoded:
Thanks Sam and Brian,

I cant wait until it’s BBQ season here in the Northwest so I can try those recipes out. We have lots of fresh seafood up in our area and I am wondering if you could use the musel recipe in a steamer with oyster or clams too?
Thanks to Sam, Brian and of course Paul for brining these great videos to us.
p.s. Sam are you always so high strung? 🙂
